news.headline: Surf Air Mobility names David Anderman to board of directors on Dec 17, 2024. Previously CLO, now with Stellar Ventures.
news.summary: In Los Angeles, Surf Air Mobility Inc. (NYSE: SRFM) has revealed that David Anderman will join the Company’s board of directors from December 17, 2024. He previously held the position of Chief Legal Officer at Surf Air between June 2023 and May 2024. Anderman is presently the Co-Founder and General Partner of Stellar Ventures, a venture fund focusing on supporting upcoming space innovators.

news.headline: Cloudflare sets Investor Day on 3/12/2025, 1pm-3:30pm (EST). Held at NYSE, NY, live webcast available.
news.summary: Cloudflare, Inc. (NYSE: NET) has disclosed that it will be organizing an Investor Day on Wednesday, March 12, 2025. Scheduled to commence at 1:00 p.m. Eastern time (10:00 a.m. Pacific time), the event is anticipated to end around 3:30 p.m. Eastern time (12:30 p.m. Pacific time). The venue for the Investor Day will be the New York Stock Exchange located in New York, NY. Additionally, a live webcast of the event will be available on the Cloudflare investor relations website.

news.headline: Crypto indexes gaining importance, mirroring S&P 500's role. Strong indexes attract more stakeholders, driving market trends. Bitcoin initially dominated, but now need for balanced approach with assets like Ethereum to reflect sector growth. Strategic index creation fosters innovation and mainstream adoption.
news.summary: The S&P 500 is a key indicator for the health of the US stock market and now, crypto indexes are gaining similar importance due to market developments. As more investors include digital assets in their portfolios, creating strong crypto indexes becomes crucial to showcase the sector's growth and attract more stakeholders. A robust index would signify the large addressable market for crypto, encourage institutional adoption, and drive consumer acceptance of blockchain technology. It is essential to build indexes reflecting long-term market trends and attract diverse stakeholders. The crypto sector has evolved from unipolar (centered around Bitcoin) to bipolar (inclusive of Ethereum and NFTs), with some indexes still biased towards certain assets. Investors should understand these dynamics when choosing a suitable crypto index for their investment objectives.

news.headline: FedEx plans to separate $30B freight unit in efforts to streamline operations.
Associated Bank adds 4 relationship managers to boost commercial banking expansion. Names include Stacy Quick, Kevin Kopaska, Mike Hauswirth.
news.summary: Today in Green Bay, Wisconsin on December 19, 2024, Associated Banc-Corp (NYSE: ASB) revealed the recruitment of four seasoned relationship managers to their expanding commercial banking team. Stacy Quick, Kevin Kopaska, Mike Hauswirth, and a fourth individual have officially joined the company.

news.headline: Astrana Health to join investor conference in Dec 2024. Based in ALHAMBRA, Calif., it operates under NASDAQ: ASTH.
news.summary: On December 19, 2024, in Alhambra, California, Astrana Health, Inc. (NASDAQ: ASTH) announced its position as a prominent healthcare company focused on provider-centric, technology-driven services. This company, along with its subsidiaries, aims to facilitate accessible healthcare for its clientele.

news.headline: ACRES Commercial Realty Corp. reauthorizes $5M share repurchase program, Board approves continued use.
news.summary: In Uniondale, N.Y. on December 19, 2024, ACRES Commercial Realty Corp. disclosed that its board of directors sanctioned the extension of its current share repurchase initiative. The authorized amount for repurchasing is an additional $5 million. The company, identified as NYSE: ACR, aims to utilize this program for enhancing shareholder value.

news.headline: ACNB Corporation and Traditions Bancorp receive shareholder approvals for acquisition.
news.summary: In Gettysburg, Pennsylvania, on December 19, 2024, ACNB Corporation (NASDAQ: ACNB) received approval from their shareholders for the acquisition of Traditions Bancorp, Inc. (OTC Pink: TRBK). ACNB is the parent company of ACNB Bank, based in Gettysburg, while Traditions Bank, headquartered in York, Pennsylvania, is a subsidiary of Traditions Bancorp, Inc. This marks a significant development in the financial sector with this merger bringing together two community banks. The acquisition received positive responses from both ACNB and Traditions shareholders, signifying a green light for the deal to move forward.

news.headline: IFF announces board changes for strategic growth: Kevin O'Byrne appointed as new Board Chair for transition in 2025, succeeding Roger Ferguson, Jr.
news.summary: In New York, IFF (NYSE: IFF) has announced a significant development in its Board of Directors to enhance the company's strategic vision and drive profitable market share growth. Kevin O’Byrne, current member of the IFF board and chair of Centrica plc, will take over as Board Chair at the 2025 Annual Shareholder Meeting. O’Byrne will replace Roger W. Ferguson, Jr., who has been Chair since 2022. Ferguson has informed IFF of his decision not to continue in the role beyond 2025.

news.headline: Nike, Inc. reported Q2 fiscal 2025 revenues of $12.4 billion, down 8% from the previous year. Direct revenues were $5.0 billion.
news.summary: Beaverton-based global sports company NIKE, Inc. announced its fiscal 2025 second-quarter financial results for the period ending November 30, 2024. The quarterly revenues stood at $12.4 billion, showing an 8 percent decline on a reported basis from the previous year and a 9 percent decrease on a currency-neutral basis. NIKE Direct revenues totaled $5.0 billion, marking a 13 percent drop on a reported basis and a 14 percent decrease on a currency-neutral basis, while Wholesale revenues amounted to $6.9 billion, down 3 percent on a reported basis.

news.headline: Hess Midstream LP to join investor conferences, discussing latest developments. #business #investment
news.summary: The new data released shows that the unemployment rate has dropped to 4.5%, the lowest it has been in five years. This decrease represents a total of 700,000 fewer people without jobs compared to the previous quarter. Additionally, the economy has grown by 6% in the last year, with the GDP reaching a record high of $22 trillion. In response to these figures, analysts are optimistic about the future economic outlook and job market stability.

news.headline: Eaton appoints Lucy Clark Dougherty as general counsel, replacing Taras Szmagala Jr. on April 4, 2025.
news.summary: An intelligent power management company, Eaton (NYSE:ETN), based in Dublin, recently announced the appointment of Lucy Clark Dougherty as their new General Counsel, starting January 27, 2025. She will take over from Taras “Terry” Szmagala Jr. as the Executive Vice President and Chief Legal Officer when he retires on April 4, 2025. In her new position, Dougherty will provide legal advice to Eaton’s executive management team and Board of Directors, as well as oversee the company’s worldwide Legal department.

news.headline: Universal Corporation announces the release of its 2024 Sustainability Report, showcasing progress in sustainability efforts.
news.summary: Richmond, Virginia - On December 19, 2024, Universal Corporation (NYSE:UVV), a leading global agriproducts company, unveiled its 2024 Sustainability Report showcasing the significant strides made in key sustainability initiatives. The report offers comprehensive insights into the company's sustainability efforts and achievements. Universal Corporation continues to demonstrate its commitment to sustainable practices and transparency as it works towards becoming a more environmentally-friendly and socially responsible organization.

news.headline: ACRES Commercial Realty Corp declares cash dividends for Preferred Stock, including 8.625% Fixed-to-Floating Series C.
news.summary: ACRES Commercial Realty Corp. (NYSE: ACR) based in Uniondale, N.Y., reported on December 19, 2024, that its Board of Directors has approved cash dividends on its Preferred Stock. The Company is set to pay a cash dividend on its 8.625% Fixed-to-Floating Series C Cumulative Preferred Stock. This move highlights the commitment of the Company to provide returns to its investors and shareholders. This news signifies a significant financial decision for the Company, indicating stability, profitability, and a focus on investor value.

This move underscores Cetera's ongoing commitment to providing top-notch services to its clients and advancing its platform.

news.summary: In Wheeling, West Virginia on December 19, 2024, WesBanco, Inc., a multi-state bank holding company listed on Nasdaq as WSBC, shared news of its latest financial move. The company's Board of Directors revealed the declaration of a quarterly cash dividend for its 6.75% Non-Cumulative Perpetual Preferred shares. This decision will impact all outstanding shares, providing investors with a return on their investment. With this update, WesBanco, Inc. continues to uphold its commitment to delivering value to its shareholders through dividend payouts.

news.headline: Invesco Mortgage Capital Inc. (NYSE: IVR) declares $0.40 per share common dividend for Q4 2024, paid on Jan 24, 2025.
news.summary: Atlanta, on December 19, 2024, Invesco Mortgage Capital Inc. revealed that the Board of Directors sanctioned a cash dividend of $0.40 per common stock share for Q4 of 2024. Shareholders can expect to receive the dividend on January 24, 2025.

news.summary: First Horizon Corporation, listed under NYSE as FHN, has scheduled the disclosure of its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024 on January 16, 2025. The announcement will be made at around 6:30 am ET/5:30 on the company's investor relations website, ir.firsthorizon.com.

news.headline: Third Coast Bancshares, Inc. (NASDAQ: TCBX) declares $17.25/share quarterly cash dividend on its 6.75% Series A Preferred Stock.
news.summary: Houston-based Third Coast Bancshares, Inc. (NASDAQ: TCBX), parent company of Third Coast Bank, revealed on December 19, 2024, that its Board of Directors approved a quarterly cash dividend of $17.25 per share on its 6.75% Series A Convertible Non–Cumulative Preferred stock.

news.headline: NY Public Service Commission approved new rates for utility business for 3 years with no significant modifications to joint proposal.
news.summary: The approval of a three-year rate settlement without significant modifications to the joint proposal has been confirmed. The settlement will be in effect for the next three years. Key numbers involved in the settlement include the rates for residential and commercial customers, as well as any potential changes to fees or surcharges. The decision ensures stability for consumers and stakeholders alike, providing a clear path for financial planning over the next three years.

news.headline: RBB Bancorp announces Johnny Lee as new President, effective Jan 1, 2025, and as CEO from May 22, 2025. Leadership succession plan outlined.
news.summary: LOS ANGELES, December 19, 2024 - RBB Bancorp (NASDAQ: RBB) has announced that as of January 1, 2025, Mr. Johnny Lee, the current President and Chief Banking Officer of Royal Business Bank, will assume the role of President of the Company, President and CEO of the Bank, and will also join as a director of both the Company and the Bank. Additionally, starting May 22, 2025, Mr. Lee will take on the position of CEO of the Company. With experience garnered from various financial institutions, Mr. Lee is poised to bring valuable expertise to lead the Company towards further growth and success.

news.headline: Presidio Property Trust updates its share repurchase program.

news.headline: Gemcor, with 80+ years of experience, offers advanced factory integration with automated fastening systems.約80年の製造エクセレンスを持つGemcor Production SolutionsがAscent Aerospaceの下で先進的な工場統合を提供。uplicaten主な数字は2,000以上のインストール。
news.summary: A company named Gemcor offers adaptable automated solutions for precise drilling and fastening tasks, combining established dependability with innovative technology. Based in MACOMB, Mich., as of Dec. 17, 2024, Gemcor Production Solutions (Gemcor) has successfully implemented more than 2,000 installations since its establishment in 1937.

news.headline: AMCON Distributing Company declares $0.28 special dividend to shareholders. Payable on January 31, 2025, to those on record by December 30, 2024.

The dividend will be paid on January 31, 2025, to shareholders recorded as of December 30, 2024. AMCON, along with its subsidiaries Team Sledd, LLC and Henry’s Foods, Inc., operates as a prominent Convenience and Foodservice Distributor. The announcement came from AMCON's Board of Directors.

news.headline: Expedia Group appoints Scott Schenkel as CFO, effective after filing Form 10-K by Feb 7, 2025. Julie Whalen to remain as CFO until then.

Julie Whalen will continue as CFO until February to facilitate a seamless transition. Mr. Schenkel will take over the CFO position and oversee financial matters at Expedia Group.

news.headline: Cryptocurrency market plunges - Bitcoin: -5.7%, Ethereum: -9.3%, XRP: -6.5%, Dogecoin: -14.1% on post-FOMC turmoil. Bitcoin falls to $97,083.43. Large transaction volume drops by 7.4%. 368,308 traders liquidated at $1.19 billion. Whales buy $1 billion BTC during dip. Exodus shares rise by 37% on Wall Street debut.
news.summary: Cryptocurrency markets saw a decline on Thursday, as Bitcoin dropped below $100,000 after the recent Federal Reserve meeting. The current prices are as follows: Bitcoin at $97,083.43 (-5.7%), Ethereum at $3,377.75 (-9.3%), Solana at $192.61 (-8.3%), XRP at $2.21 (-6.5%), Dogecoin at $0.312 (-14.1%), and Shiba Inu at $0.00002161 (-12%). Important stats reveal a 7.4% decrease in large transaction volume, with transactions over $100,000 down from 14,557 to 13,516 in a day. A total of 368,308 traders were liquidated, amounting to $1.19 billion, the highest since Dec.10. Additionally, data shows a 4.09% decrease in exchanges netflows. Analyst Ali Martinez highlighted that whales purchased $1 billion worth of BTC during the market dip. Noteworthy news includes crypto wallet provider Exodus making a successful Wall Street debut with shares rising by 37%, and Germany's largest bank reportedly ... (full story available on Benzinga.com).

news.headline: JBM lists 504-unit multifamily portfolio Oasis Naples and Coral Palms in Naples, FL for TE Miller.
news.summary: In Naples, Florida on December 19, 2024, JBM® Institutional Multifamily Advisors announced the exclusive listing of Oasis Naples and Coral Palms for TE Miller. This portfolio includes a total of 504 units and offers significant potential for value enhancement and positive lease tradeouts. Prospective buyers will be provided with the opportunity to explore the investment potential of these properties, which present a promising opportunity for growth.

news.headline: Missouri American Water gives $20K to Urban League of St. Louis for workforce development programs to bridge equality gap.
news.summary: The American Water Charitable Foundation, a non-profit organization founded by American Water, the leading regulated water and wastewater utility company in the U.S., alongside Missouri American Water, disclosed a $20,000 pledge for the Urban League of Metropolitan St. Louis. This grant is a component of a broader Foundation Corporate Strategic funding, aimed at bolstering workforce development programs to address disparities for African Americans and other marginalized communities in the region.

news.headline: Bowman wins contracts for geospatial data & asset management in Texas, worth $900,000 for exploration company.
news.summary: Bowman Consulting Group Ltd., a national engineering services firm listed on NASDAQ as BWMN, based in Reston, Virginia, has recently disclosed securing two notable contracts. These contracts, valued at nearly $900,000 when combined, involve providing asset management and data collection services. The services will be delivered to a prominent exploration and production company operating in the Permian Basin region. Bowman specializes in delivering infrastructure solutions and program management services to clients involved in the ownership, development, and maintenance of the built environment.

news.headline: Republic appoints James Newman as General Partner & VP of Operations, bringing 20 years of experience in finance and tech.
news.summary: Republic, a prominent global investment platform merging finance and technology, has appointed James Newman as General Partner – Fund Manager & Vice President of Operations. With over twenty years of experience in traditional finance, venture development, investing, and expertise in Web3 and digital assets, Newman's leadership is seen as crucial to Republic's operations.

news.headline: Molecular Templates (Nasdaq: MTEM) faces delisting due to being a "public shell," not filing required reports, and failing to maintain bid price. Trading to be suspended on Dec 26, 2024.
news.summary: Molecular Templates, Inc., a biopharmaceutical company on Nasdaq as MTEM, was notified by Nasdaq that it is considered a "public shell" and faced delisting due to non-compliance with filing rules and bid price requirements. Failure to file the September 30, 2024 Form 10-Q and maintain a $1.00 bid price led to the decision. Trading of the company's stock will be suspended on December 26, 2024, unless they appeal and rectify the issues. The company does not plan to appeal and anticipates the suspension to take effect on the specified date.

news.headline: Pyxis Oncology shifts focus to PYX-201, its key clinical program, through portfolio realignment.
U.S. natural gas hits $3.59 per million British units, up 6.5% this week. Rising prices could increase utility bills.
news.summary: U.S. natural gas prices surged on Thursday, with the Henry Hub benchmark leaping 6.5% to $3.59 per million British units, marking the highest close since January 2023. Prices have risen by 9.5% since the beginning of the week, indicating the potential for the eighth week of gains out of the last nine. The recent increase is attributed to strong withdrawals from storage, solid domestic and global demand, and ongoing geopolitical uncertainties in Europe. This upward trend in natural gas prices could lead to challenges with inflation and the economy, possibly resulting in higher utility costs for American consumers in the near future. The rise in natural gas prices compounds concerns following a Federal Reserve meeting this week, where policymakers projected higher inflation for next year and suggested a slower rate of rate cuts. Furthermore, the U.S. Energy Information Administration confirmed a third consecutive triple-digit drop in storage with a reported 125 billion.

news.headline: ASA Gold and Precious Metals Fund has adopted a limited-duration shareholder rights plan. The plan expires on December 20, 2024.
news.summary: In Portland, Maine, the Rights Plan Committee of the Board of Directors of ASA Gold and Precious Metals Limited (NYSE: ASA) has approved a limited-duration shareholder rights plan to safeguard the Company and its shareholders. The current plan is set to end on December 20, 2024. The newly implemented Rights Plan mirrors the existing one significantly.

news.headline: FedEx reports Q2 EPS of $3.03 and adjusted EPS of $4.05. Revenue $22.0B, operating income $1.05B.
news.summary: FedEx Corp. announced its second quarter results for the period ending November 30, with revenue totaling $22.0 billion for both fiscal 2025 and fiscal 2024. Operating income was reported at $1.05 billion (GAAP) and $1.38 billion (adjusted, non-GAAP) for fiscal 2025, while for fiscal 2024, it was $1.28 billion (GAAP) and $1.42 billion (adjusted, non-GAAP). The operating margin stood at 4.8% for fiscal 2025 and 6.3% for fiscal 2024.

news.headline: Curbline Properties declares $0.25 per share special cash dividend, payable on January 16, 2025 to stockholders.
news.summary: Curbline Properties Corp. (NYSE: CURB) based in New York, announced a special cash dividend of $0.25 per share today. This real estate company specializes in owning convenience shopping centers located strategically on curbline of busy intersections and major traffic routes in affluent suburban areas. The dividend is set to be paid on January 16, 2025, to shareholders on record as of December 31, 2024. Curbline Properties focuses on managing these properties to serve the local community effectively.

news.headline: BJ’s Wholesale Club opens 40th club in Florida at St. Johns on December 20, 2024, featuring gas station with low prices.
news.summary: BJ’s Wholesale Club (NYSE: BJ) has revealed plans for the opening of its newest location in St. Johns, Florida on December 20, 2024. Situated at 115 Beachwalk Blvd. in the Beachwalk East Shopping Center, this will mark the 40th club for the company in Florida. The new establishment will include an on-site BJ’s Gas station offering competitive fuel prices and possible additional discounts through the BJ’s Fuel Saver Program. BJ’s is known for providing exceptional value on a wide range of daily necessities, all available in a convenient one-stop shopping experience.

news.headline: FCPT buys P.F. Chang's property for $4.8 million, expanding its net-leased restaurant portfolio.
news.summary: In Mill Valley, California, a real estate investment trust known as Four Corners Property Trust (NYSE:FCPT) has recently acquired a P.F. Chang's property for $4.8 million. The property is a part of the company's portfolio which primarily consists of high-quality, net-leased restaurant and retail properties. P.F. Chang's China Bistro, a popular American casual dining restaurant chain, operates over 200 locations in the United States and offers Asian fusion cuisine. This acquisition highlights FCPT's strategy of investing in well-established properties within the restaurant sector.

news.headline: Mister Car Wash transfers stock listing from NYSE to Nasdaq, effective Dec 31, 2024. Ticker symbol remains "MCW".
news.summary: In Tucson, Arizona, Mister Car Wash, Inc. (NYSE: MCW), the largest car wash brand in the U.S., revealed its decision to shift the listing of its common stock from NYSE to Nasdaq Global Select Market. The transition is set to occur on December 31, 2024, post market closure. Trading under the ticker symbol "MCW", the company anticipates its common stock to commence trading on Nasdaq starting January 2, 2025. This move signifies a significant strategy change for the renowned car wash brand.

news.headline: Cody Two Bears named CEO of Indigenized Energy, a Native-led organization focusing on sustainable solar systems.
news.summary: A pioneering figure in the renewable energy sector has recently been elevated to a leadership role within Indigenized Energy, a group focused on empowering Native communities by constructing durable solar energy solutions. The exciting announcement was made on December 19, 2024, in San Diego. This move signifies a shift towards a new stage in advocating and enacting renewable energy practices.

news.headline: Itron and Xcel Energy work together to manage rising DERs in Colorado, incl. residential battery storage, enhancing grid flexibility.
news.summary: Itron and Xcel Energy have joined forces to handle the increasing amount of Distributed Energy Resources (DERs), such as residential battery energy storage systems, in order to bolster grid flexibility.

news.headline: Sight Sciences' TearCare® System for MGD offers cost savings over existing treatments, as per Expert Review of Ophthalmology.
news.summary: An analysis on budget impact was recently released in the Expert Review of Ophthalmology journal. The study delved into the financial implications related to ophthalmology services and treatments. The analysis revealed significant figures regarding the budget impact of such services, shedding light on the costs involved. This publication is expected to provide valuable insights for both healthcare professionals and policymakers in managing finances related to ophthalmic care.

news.headline: 89bio granted 48,000 stock options to new employee under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4) on Dec 13, 2024.
news.summary: On December 13, 2024, 89bio, Inc. (Nasdaq: ETNB), a biopharmaceutical company in San Francisco, approved the granting of 48,000 non-qualified stock options to a new employee as part of an inducement plan. These options allow the purchase of the company's common stock and were issued under the 2023 Inducement Plan by the Compensation Committee of the Board of Directors. The grant was made in accordance with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4) to incentivize the individual's employment with the company.
